Gaiman Port

System / Location · First seen 3304-08-17 · 2 mentions

L
Kamici
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3304-08-24
Order Restored in Kamici
Kamici Incorporated announces the successful conclusion of its campaign to clear the Kamici system of felons. Hundreds of pilots responded, eliminating criminals operating in the system. Authorities extend gratitude to participants.
3304-08-17
Restoring Order in Kamici
Authorities in the Kamici system report a rise in criminals attacking pilots and disrupting trade. Kamici Incorporated places a kill order on wanted ships and promises rewards for bounty vouchers delivered to Gaiman Port.
